The '''520 Battle Platform''' was a heavily [[Armored personnel carrier/Legends|armored personnel carrier]] that was originally designed by [[Aratech Repulsor Company/Legends|Aratech]]. The 520 was equipped with four powerful [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]] on the sides and strong [[Deflector shield generator/Legends|shield generators]]. Two [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolasers]] located on the front and back were capable of penetrating heavily armored vehicles, such as the [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|AT-AT]] [[Walker/Legends|walkers]] used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. Four anti-infantry laser cannons protected the battle platform against infantry-based attacks; however, it had no anti-air defenses. 

Although unclear how, Bel Iblis acquired the only prototype of the 520 Battle Platform from Aratech's research facilities, halting plans for its large-scale production. His vehicle, which he gave the designation ''[[Gargantuan]]'', was used during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] to aid the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].
